subcodes.first_line: In this day the rustling of the Divine Lote-Tree is raised aloft, bearing unto the dwellers of earth glad-tidings of the dawning horizon of Him Who conversed upon the Mount [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز حفیف سدره منتهی مرتفع و اهل ارض را بافق ظهور مکلم طور بشارت میدهد و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
